qFieldDefs:
=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAMPeakReload_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows' AND Aggr(Sum([AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)' AND Aggr(Sum([App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName))))))

qMsg.qv: ='Rolling storage of app metadata metrics is not enabled. To enable, please flip the variable "vu_track_app_meta_over_time" to "1" in the load script and reload the application."

qValueExpression.qExpr:
=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)',If(GetPossibleCount(AppRAMSizeQuota)=1,AppRAMSizeQuota/1024/1024,Null()),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)',$(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota)/1024/1024,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows',If(GetPossibleCount(AppRecordCountThreshold)<>1,Null(),AppRecordCountThreshold),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields',If(GetPossibleCount(NoOfFields)<>1,Null(),NoOfFields),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)',If(GetPossibleCount(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold)<>1,Null(),Interval(Round(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold/(60*60*24),'hh:mm:ss'))),
)))))

qStringExpression.qExpr:
=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)',If(GetPossibleCount(AppRAMSizeQuota)=1,AppRAMSizeQuota/1024/1024,Null()),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App Peak Reload RAM (MB)',$(vAppRAMPeakReloadSizeQuota)/1024/1024,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows',If(GetPossibleCount(AppRecordCountThreshold)<>1,Null(),AppRecordCountThreshold),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields',If(GetPossibleCount(NoOfFields)<>1,Null(),NoOfFields),
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)',If(GetPossibleCount(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold)<>1,Null(),Interval(Round(ReloadCPUTimeThreshold/(60*60*24),'hh:mm:ss'))),
)))))

qProperty.subtitle: Only includes Apps for which measures have data for.

byDimDef.label: ='App Name'
byDimDef.key:
=If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='App RAM (MB)' AND Aggr(Sum([AppRAM_MB - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Rows' AND Aggr(Sum([AppTableNoOfRows - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Fields' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNumberOfDistinctFields - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Total Tables' AND Aggr(Sum([AppNoOfTables - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName,
If('$(vRollingLineSelect)'='Reload Time (hh:mm:ss)' AND Aggr(Sum([App Reload CPU Time (ms) - Rolling]),AppName)>0,AppName)))))
